title: The Yankee Consul
writer: Henry Martyn Blossom, Raymond Cannon, Raymond Griffith
actors: Arthur Stuart Hull, Douglas MacLean, Patsy Ruth Miller
plot: Last-minute confusion forces travel agent Dudley Ainsworth to pose as Abijah Boos, American consul to a South American country. On a passenger ship bound for Rio, he meets Margarita Carrosa and becomes involved in a conspiracy inv...
